nodes.label: Vilches Abogados — LeadUp Profile Card
nodes.description: UI screenshot of a lead intelligence profile card for Vilches Abogados (Madrid law firm, 35 professionals). Shows lead score 71/100, classification 'Posible', 3 decision makers identified, digital ecosystem diagnostic, and HBD Revolution opportunity sections.

nodes.label: LeadUp — Lead Intelligence UI
nodes.description: The parent application UI surface: LeadUp CRM/lead scoring tool, showing a structured profile card layout with sections for decision makers, digital ecosystem diagnosis, and sales opportunities.

nodes.label: Lead Score 71/100 — Posible
nodes.description: Lead scoring component showing numeric score 71/100 with classification label 'Posible' and 3 DMs (decision makers) badge. Represents the OFTMD scoring system.

nodes.label: Decision Makers — Samuel Hernández, Cristina Vilches, Pedro López Ruiz
nodes.description: Decision makers panel listing: Samuel Hernández (CEO/Founder, primary contact), Cristina Vilches (Social Directora, secondary), Pedro López Ruiz (Director Comercial, mediator). Includes LinkedIn and verified phone indicators.
nodes.norm_label: decision makers — samuel hernandez, cristina vilches, pedro lopez ruiz

nodes.label: Ecosistema Digital — Diagnóstico
nodes.description: Digital ecosystem diagnostic section covering: web presence (OFTMD score), social media channels (Google Ads, Instagram, YouTube, reseñas), CRM (Google HubSpot básico), lead capture (basic), SEO (local positioning), and HBD attention score.

nodes.label: Oportunidades HBD Revolution
nodes.description: Sales opportunity panel divided into three columns: Sales/CRM (automation pipelines, lead management, -30% conversion), Tech/IA (administrative automation, documentary IA generation, -40% impact), Contenido AV (branded audiovisual content, higher quality video, YouTube premium, brand differentiation).

nodes.label: Vilches Abogados — Law Firm Entity
nodes.description: Business entity: Vilches Abogados, Madrid. 35 professionals. Website: vilchesabogados.com. Practice areas: Penal, Civil, Divorcios, Derecho de Familia. Active on Google Ads, Instagram, YouTube.

nodes.label: Veo3 Fast — Video Generation Node UI
nodes.description: Screenshot of a Veo3 Fast video generation node interface (dark theme). The node is labeled 'Veo3 Fast' and shows a prompt input field (Describe el video, movimientos y estilo), scenario settings (Escenarios), aspect ratio selector (16:9), duration (5s), resolution (720p), keyframe upload (JPG/PNG/WEBP up to 20MB), reference video upload (MP4/WebM/MOV up to 50MB), reference audio upload (WAV/MP3/M4A up to 10MB), and toggles for audio sync (on), return last frame (off), online search (off), and content verification (on). A 'Ejecutar nodo' (Run node) button is visible at the top.
nodes.ui_context: workflow node editor (likely n8n or similar no-code automation platform)
nodes.norm_label: veo3 fast — video generation node ui

nodes.label: Workflow Node Editor (n8n-style)
nodes.description: The UI context appears to be a visual workflow / automation builder (such as n8n) where AI model nodes can be configured and executed.

nodes.label: AI Video Generation — Concept
nodes.description: The node implements an AI video generation capability (text-to-video / image-to-video) using Google's Veo3 Fast model, with support for keyframe images, reference videos, and reference audio.
